item.title: The 13 best places to travel solo in 2026
item.description: From Thailand to Chile to New Zealand, here are 13 incredible places to travel solo.

item.title: United's new MileagePlus reality: Cardholders win, others lose ground
item.description: United Airlines shook up its loyalty program this week with new incentives for credit cardholders, and hurdles for those who don't carry a card.

item.title: I booked a luxury staycation — and somehow came out $1 ahead
item.description: I booked a luxury staycation with American Express Fine Hotels + Resorts for less cash. Here's how I searched for a hotel and used my Amex Platinum's ...

item.title: American AAdvantage miles vs. Loyalty Points: What's the difference?
item.description: Learn about the difference between American Airlines Loyalty Points and miles, including why your Loyalty Points reset every March 1.

item.title: 7 of the best cards to pair with the Amex Gold
item.description: The Amex Gold is one of the best cards on the market. Here are some of the best cards you can pair it with to maximize your earnings.
